product_goal: Create a compact monitor-top desk companion that gives presence and posture cues without reading like a toy or an intrusive camera product.

hard_constraints.rule: Keep the main body within 140 x 38 x 20 mm.
Use a monitor-top contact and rear support strategy instead of a spring clamp.
Preserve access to ports and the local control zone without full disassembly.

mounting_strategy.contact_points: small front contact point and rear support arm
mounting_strategy.support_logic: Use stable contact geometry and center-of-mass placement rather than a spring clamp.
mounting_strategy.service_access_notes: Keep the right-side service area reachable in-place.

style_features.name: quiet bar silhouette
style_features.rule: Preserve a long horizontal body with restrained height.

style_features.name: ordered front hierarchy
style_features.rule: Keep left display, central sensor, and right service area visually legible.

style_features.name: controlled facets
style_features.rule: Use subtle chamfers or facets instead of heavy curves.

manufacturing_risks: The right-side service zone may become too crowded for ports and button access.
The rear support arm may read thinner than the required structure.
Camera depth and alignment may conflict with a shallow main body.
forbidden_features: A hidden service port that requires full shell removal
Front-face asymmetry that breaks left-to-right clarity

acceptance_checks.title: Main body envelope
acceptance_checks.method: Measure the draft body bounding box.
acceptance_checks.pass_condition: At or below 140 x 38 x 20 mm.

acceptance_checks.title: Mounting credibility
acceptance_checks.method: Review the side profile and support geometry.
acceptance_checks.pass_condition: The device reads as physically stable on a monitor top edge.

acceptance_checks.title: Front-face order
acceptance_checks.pass_condition: Display, sensor, and service areas remain clearly ordered.

acceptance_checks.title: Service access
acceptance_checks.pass_condition: Basic service interactions remain reachable without major disassembly.
